bookTheme: The Gospel Spreads to the Ends of the Earth

divisions.title: Birth of the Church
divisions.summary: Ascension of Jesus, choosing Matthias, Pentecost, and Peter's sermon

divisions.title: Jerusalem Ministry
divisions.summary: Early miracles, apostles' boldness, Ananias and Sapphira, choosing deacons, Stephen's martyrdom

divisions.title: Judea and Samaria
divisions.summary: Philip's ministry, Saul's conversion, Peter's vision, Gentiles receive the Spirit, Antioch church

divisions.title: First Missionary Journey
divisions.summary: Barnabas and Saul sent out, ministry in Cyprus and Galatia, opposition and return

divisions.title: Jerusalem Council
divisions.summary: Debate over circumcision, council's decision, letter sent to Gentile believers

divisions.title: Second and Third Journeys
divisions.summary: Macedonia, Athens, Corinth, Ephesus, farewell to Ephesian elders

divisions.title: Journey to Rome
divisions.summary: Arrest in Jerusalem, defense speeches, trials before Felix, Festus, and Agrippa, shipwreck, arrival in Rome

chapterSummaries.1: Jesus ascends to heaven, Matthias chosen to replace Judas
chapterSummaries.2: Holy Spirit comes at Pentecost, Peter's sermon, three thousand baptized
chapterSummaries.3: Peter heals a lame beggar, preaches to the crowd at Solomon's Colonnade
chapterSummaries.4: Peter and John before the Sanhedrin, believers share everything in common
chapterSummaries.5: Ananias and Sapphira, apostles perform miracles, apostles arrested and freed
chapterSummaries.6: Seven chosen to serve, Stephen accused of blasphemy
chapterSummaries.7: Stephen's speech before the Sanhedrin, his martyrdom
chapterSummaries.8: Persecution scatters believers, Philip in Samaria, Ethiopian eunuch baptized
chapterSummaries.9: Saul's conversion on the road to Damascus, Saul preaches in Damascus
chapterSummaries.10: Cornelius' vision, Peter's vision, Gentiles receive the Holy Spirit
chapterSummaries.11: Peter explains his actions, Antioch church established, famine relief
chapterSummaries.12: James killed, Peter imprisoned and miraculously freed, Herod's death
chapterSummaries.13: Barnabas and Saul sent out, ministry in Cyprus and Pisidian Antioch
chapterSummaries.14: Ministry in Iconium, Lystra, and Derbe, return to Antioch
chapterSummaries.15: Jerusalem Council debates circumcision, decision sent to Gentile churches
chapterSummaries.16: Timothy joins Paul, Macedonian call, Lydia and jailer converted in Philippi
chapterSummaries.17: Thessalonica and Berea, Paul in Athens addresses the Areopagus
chapterSummaries.18: Paul in Corinth, meets Aquila and Priscilla, Apollos in Ephesus
chapterSummaries.19: Paul in Ephesus, disciples receive the Spirit, riot of the silversmiths
chapterSummaries.20: Through Macedonia and Greece, Eutychus raised, farewell to Ephesian elders
chapterSummaries.21: Journey to Jerusalem, Paul arrested in the temple
chapterSummaries.22: Paul speaks to the crowd, his conversion testimony, Roman citizenship
chapterSummaries.23: Paul before the Sanhedrin, plot to kill Paul, transferred to Caesarea
chapterSummaries.24: Trial before Felix, Paul's defense, Felix postpones decision
chapterSummaries.25: Festus succeeds Felix, Paul appeals to Caesar, Agrippa visits
chapterSummaries.26: Paul's defense before Agrippa, his conversion and calling
chapterSummaries.27: Voyage to Rome, storm at sea, shipwreck on Malta
chapterSummaries.28: Ministry on Malta, arrival in Rome, Paul preaches under house arrest
